title: Programme Executive (Active Ageing Centre - Multimedia)
description:
About Eldercare Services

Fei Yue’s Eldercare services include Active Ageing Centres, Community Case Management, Health Care Support and Elder Education work together to support seniors in ageing well within the community. These services promote active living, coordinate care for those with complex needs, guide individuals in making informed healthcare decisions, provide comfort for those with serious illnesses, and strengthen mental and emotional wellbeing for both seniors and their caregivers

Responsibilities:

Content Creation & Storytelling (Internal & External Communication)

  • End-to-end video production: Handle the planning and implementation of video production, including developing narratives, story board, script, filming and producing final product.
  • Photography: Capture and edit photos for events or campaigns
  • Infographics: Design publicity materials and infographics include but are not limited to tools such as Canva, CapCut, or Photoshop.

Social Media & Branding

  • Work with the social media team to create engaging posts for AIC Connect, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn and identified platforms
  • Adapt visuals for different formats and ensure alignment with Fei Yue’s branding and communication tone.
  • Ensure caption writing, subtitling maintains a consistent brand voice across platforms.

Collaboration & Management

  • Collaborate with staff, volunteers, leaders and partners to gather and produce meaningful stories.
  • Maintain an organised publicity/media library (photo, video, infographics) and ensure all materials comply with branding and confidentiality standards.

Training & Development

  • Utilizing blended learning approach to develop and produce instructional videos on identified tools as part of curriculum for staff in eldercare services.

Requirements:

  • Diploma and above
  • Proficiency in video editing and design tools e.g., CapCut, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro (portfolio required)
  • Good understanding of social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn)
  • Strong photography, videography and design skills, including shooting and editing
  • Creative eye for visual storytelling, layout, and composition
  • Ability to write simple, engaging captions and maintain brand tone
  • Sensitive, authentic and respectful in storytelling
  • Good communication & interpersonal skills
  • Organised in managing publicity/media files, archives, and deadlines
  • IT savvy
  • Good organisational skills and administrative skills
  • This position is on contract basis

Work location: Tiong Bahru

If you are interested to join us, please apply via Fei Yue Career Portal.

For your privacy and security, kindly refrain from including your NRIC number in your application form or resume. Please note that we do not accept hardcopy resumes.

postedCompany.description: Fei Yue Community Services is a  non-profit voluntary welfare organization established in 1996, with a mission to effect life transformation through the provision of quality social services. We are committed to serving and reaching out to the needy in Singapore through our diverse services and programmes. We believe in promoting social development among all ages, seek to inculcate the spirit of volunteerism in the community, and advocate strong family ties in the society. Our services and programmes, which are varied and cater to the needs of different client populations, include counselling, adoption, family life education,  early intervention programmes for infants and children, and services for youths, elderly, inmates and their families.
postedCompany.name: Fei Yue Community Services
